rows.headline: Ross Gerber Invokes Netflix, Says Mercedes Made A 'Blockbuster' Error By Letting 10% Tesla Stake Slip Away
rows.summary: Gerber of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth Mgmt agrees with social media post that Mercedes' $50M investment in Tesla in 2009 would be worth $130B now.

rows.headline: Jim Cramer Says Towns Should Demand 'Strict Adherence' From Big Tech Building Data Centers
rows.summary: Jim Cramer urges towns to demand 'strict adherence' to pollution rules and extract value from neo-cloud hyperscaler data centers.

rows.headline: Tesla Faces Double Whammy As Oil Hits $110 And Bond Yields Climb, Gary Black Says Fundamentals Unchanged But Stock Likely To Get 'Whacked'
rows.summary: Gary Black says higher interest rates and oil prices are causing Tesla's valuation to drop, making it vulnerable.

rows.headline: Target, Nvidia And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
rows.summary: U.S. stock futures mixed, focus on NVIDIA, Toll Brothers, Target, Roblox, Lowe's earnings. Roblox announces $3B repurchase program. Photo: Shutterstock

rows.headline: S&P 500 Falls For Third Straight Session: Investor Sentiment Weakens, Fear Index Remains In 'Greed' Zone

rows.summary: BofA technical strategist Paul Ciana flagged an all-time-high weekly RSI on the VanEck Semiconductor ETF this week. Seven prior signals since 1995 averaged a 44% drawdown that took roughly 73 weeks to bottom.
